title: April 14th, 2022
body:

actors acting act actions

consumers consuming consume consumables

capitalism: you don't have an identity. you can't create an identity. any identity you need must be consumed

transcendentalism: you don't have an identity. you can't create an identity. any identity you need must be apprehended

you identify. you disidentify. your experience emerges from the intersectional dynamicism of dis/identification and

lyrics

when ya focus on your actions, that's the actor in you
thought you were the master but forgot to factor in who's masterin you
every listener is an engineer
train to play the music long as you want
but the engine's in ear

i can fit a lot in my pockets
so when the shoe drops i ain't stuck rockin


i don't break making machines

i make breaking machines

i make bacon in sheets

and ain't about to beg you to eat
